title.ko: 흡연 또는 씹는담배의 제조 또는 처리; 담배; 코담배 (SNUFF)
title.en: MANUFACTURE OR PREPARATION OF TOBACCO FOR SMOKING OR CHEWING; TOBACCO; SNUFF

definition.ko: 처리 A24B1/00, A24B3/00 줄기 떼어내기; 썰기; 가습 A24B5/00; 7/00, A24B3/00, A24B9/00 담배 꼬는 기계 A24B11/00 화학적 처리 A24B15/00 담배 A24B13/00

title.en: Preparation of tobacco on the plantation
Arrangements in barns for preparatory treatment of the tobacco, e.g. with devices for drying
Sifting, sorting, cleaning or removing impurities from tobacco
Stringing tobacco leaves
Suspending devices for tobacco leaves
Packing or pressing tobacco
Preparing tobacco in the factory
Humidifying packed raw tobacco

title.ko: 담배 잎 다발 또는 절각 담배 잎의 조습 또는 건조(A24B 3/12가 우선)
title.en: Humidifying or drying tobacco bunches or cut tobacco (A24B0003120000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 담배 잎 또는 절각 담배 잎의 해체(A24B 3/07이 우선)
title.en: Loosening tobacco leaves or cut tobacco (A24B0003070000 takes precedence)
Cutting or removing tie leaves; Cutting-off stem butts
Blending tobacco
Roasting or cooling tobacco
Steaming, curing, or flavouring tobacco

title.ko: 재생담배 예. 휘감는 재료, 시트, 모조엽, 봉 형태, 점결 케익 형태; 그와 같은 제품의 형상(광택을 없애는 것 A24C 1/40)
title.en: Forming reconstituted tobacco products, e.g. wrapper materials, sheets, imitation leaves, rods, cakes; Forms of such products (delustering A24C0001400000)
Classifying or aligning leaves
Other treatment of leaves, e.g. puffing, crimpling, cleaning

title.ko: 담배 잎의 줄기 떼어내기; 주엽맥 또는 지엽맥 처리
title.en: Stripping tobacco; Treatment of stems or ribs
by plucking out the stem
by cutting out the stem
by stripping leaf-parts from the stem
by cutting-off, shaving off, pressing flat the thick parts of stems or ribs
by crushing the leaves with subsequent separating
Auxiliary devices for stripping
Flattening machines for leaves or stems

title.ko: 주엽맥 또는 지엽맥의 다른 처리, 구부리기, 썰기, 절개(incising)(조습 A24B 3/04)
title.en: Other treatment of stems or ribs, e.g. bending, chopping, incising (humidifying A24B0003040000)
Cutting tobacco
by machines with reciprocating knives
by machines with revolving knives
with two co-operating sets of knife discs
with several knives which act one after the other
with cutter axes parallel to the feeding direction
with cutter axes transverse to the feeding direction
Feeding or control devices for tobacco-cutting apparatus

title.ko: 담배제품, 예. 엽권담배, 지권담배, 파이프 담배의 수분량의 조정(담배제품의 수분량을 조정하기 위한 끽연자가 사용하는 장치 A24F 25/00)
title.en: Control of the moisture content of tobacco products, e.g. cigars, cigarettes, pipe tobacco (devices for use by the smoker for controlling the moisture content of tobacco products A24F0025000000)
Tobacco-twisting machines

title.ko: 파이프담배, 엽권담배, 예. 엽권담배의 충전물 또는 지권담배; 씹는담배; 코담배(재생 담배 A24B 3/14)
title.en: Tobacco for pipes, for cigars, e.g. cigar inserts, or for cigarettes; Chewing tobacco; Snuff (reconstituted tobacco products A24B0003140000)
Flakes or shreds of tobacco

title.ko: 담배의 화학적 요소 또는 처리; 담배 대체물, 예. 액상 형태 (A24B3/00 우선)
title.en: Chemical features or treatment of tobacco; Tobacco substitutes, e.g. in liquid form (A24B0003000000 takes precedence)
Chemical features of tobacco products or tobacco substitutes
of reconstituted tobacco
made of tobacco and a binding agent not derived from tobacco
of tobacco substitutes
in liquid or vaporisable form, e.g. liquid compositions for electronic cigarettes
Treatment of tobacco products or tobacco substitutes
Biochemical treatment
by application of electric or wave energy or particle radiation
by extraction; Tobacco extracts
Use of organic solvents for extraction
by chemical substances
by organic substances
by acyclic compounds
containing a carbocyclic ring other than a six-membered aromatic ring
containing a heterocyclic ring
having only nitrogen as hetero-atoms
having only oxygen or sulfur as hetero-atoms
by organic and inorganic substances
